data.content: canto-hk-g2p added to PyPI. Fast Cantonese text-to-phoneme (G2P) converter — Jyutping with tone numbers. data.title: IIT Madras develops indigenous pilot plant to process 100 tonnes of eWaste per year
data.content: IIT Madras develops indigenous pilot plant to process 100 tonnes of eWaste per year. IIT Madras researchers have created a pilot plant in Tiruchirapalli. This facility can process 100 tonnes of electronic waste annually. It focuses on bare printed circuit boards, recovering valuable metals like copper, lead, and tin. The innovative process us…. data.content:
